---
title: "Evaluación del volumen óptimo de riego en el cultivo de arroz (Oryza sativa L.) en el Valle del Chira, Perú"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-expand: true
    toc-depth: 4
    toc-location: left
    number-sections: true
    self-contained: true
    code-fold: true
    output-file: "ESM_1"
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
execute: 
  warning: false
  message: false
  eval: false
  echo: true
---

# Project Setup

```{python}
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.dates as mdates
import seaborn as sns
from statsmodels.stats.multicomp import pairwise_tukeyhsd
from matplotlib.patches import Patch
import statsmodels.api as sm
from statsmodels.formula.api import ols
from itertools import combinations
```

# Import data

```{python}
# ID general del Google Sheet
sheet_id = "10e-foXp3XlmSt3xHje4MmSKIYnUGZHgLvbtC3p9HPd8"

# Nombre de pestaña -> gid
tabs = {
    "morfo": "903992789",
    "rdt": "574345748",
    "calidad": "1946582062",
    "clima": "946659552"
}

# Diccionario para guardar DataFrames
dfs = {}

# Leer cada pestaña
for nombre, gid in tabs.items():

    url = (
        f"https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/"
        f"{sheet_id}/export?format=csv&gid={gid}"
    )

    dfs[nombre] = pd.read_csv(url)

# Acceder a cada DataFrame
morfo = dfs["morfo"]
rdt = dfs["rdt"]
calidad = dfs["calidad"]
clima = dfs["clima"]
```

# Objetives

The objective of this study is to demonstrate the effect of organic fertilizers, specifically compost and biol, applied at the soil and foliar levels on the quality of mango fruit at physiological and commercial maturity.

## Meteorological data

```{python}
# ======================================================
# FECHA
# ======================================================

clima["Fecha"] = pd.to_datetime(clima["Fecha"])

# ======================================================
# LOCALIDADES
# ======================================================

localidades = clima["Localidad"].unique()

# ======================================================
# LETRAS PANELES
# ======================================================

letters = ["a", "b", "c"]

# ======================================================
# FIGURA
# ======================================================

fig, axes = plt.subplots(
    nrows=len(localidades),
    ncols=1,
    figsize=(10, 10),
    sharex=True
)

# Si solo hay una localidad
if len(localidades) == 1:
    axes = [axes]

# ======================================================
# GUARDAR LEYENDA
# ======================================================

legend_handles = []
legend_labels = []

# ======================================================
# LOOP LOCALIDADES
# ======================================================

for i, loc in enumerate(localidades):

    ax = axes[i]

    # ==================================================
    # DATOS
    # ==================================================

    df = clima[
        clima["Localidad"] == loc
    ].copy()

    # ==================================================
    # LINEAS CLIMATICAS
    # ==================================================

    line1, = ax.plot(
        df["Fecha"],
        df["HR"]/3,
        linestyle="--",
        color="skyblue",
        linewidth=2,
        label="HR (%)"
    )

    line2, = ax.plot(
        df["Fecha"],
        df["Tmax"],
        linestyle="--",
        color="red",
        linewidth=2,
        label="Tmax (°C)"
    )

    line3, = ax.plot(
        df["Fecha"],
        df["Tmin"],
        linestyle=":",
        color="blue",
        linewidth=2,
        label="Tmin (°C)"
    )

    # ==================================================
    # PRECIPITACION
    # ==================================================

    ax2 = ax.twinx()

    ax2.bar(
        df["Fecha"],
        df["PP"]/3,
        width=5,
        color="cornflowerblue",
        edgecolor="black",
        alpha=0.7
    )

    # ==================================================
    # GUARDAR LEYENDA SOLO UNA VEZ
    # ==================================================

    if i == 0:

        legend_handles = [line1, line2, line3]

        legend_labels = [
            "HR (%)",
            "Tmax (°C)",
            "Tmin (°C)"
        ]

    # ==================================================
    # ETIQUETAS
    # ==================================================

    ax.set_ylabel("Temperature °C")

    ax2.set_ylabel("Precipitation (mm)")

    # mover label eje derecho
    ax2.yaxis.set_label_coords(1.03, 0.5)

    # separar ticks eje derecho
    ax2.tick_params(
        axis='y',
        pad=3
    )

    # ==================================================
    # LIMITES
    # ==================================================

    ax.set_ylim(0, 50)

    ax2.set_ylim(0, 100)

    # ==================================================
    # GRID
    # ==================================================

    ax.grid(
        True,
        linestyle="-",
        alpha=0.5
    )

    # ==================================================
    # LETRAS PANELES
    # ==================================================

    ax.text(
        0.01,
        0.95,
        letters[i],
        transform=ax.transAxes,
        fontsize=18,
        fontweight="bold",
        ha="left",
        va="top"
    )

    # ==================================================
    # OCULTAR EJE X SUPERIOR
    # ==================================================

    if i < len(localidades) - 1:

        ax.tick_params(
            axis='x',
            labelbottom=False
        )

# ======================================================
# FORMATO FECHAS
# ======================================================

axes[-1].xaxis.set_major_formatter(
    mdates.DateFormatter('%b')
)

plt.xticks(rotation=45)

# ======================================================
# LEYENDA GLOBAL
# ======================================================

fig.legend(
    legend_handles,
    legend_labels,
    loc="upper center",
    ncol=3,
    frameon=False,
    fontsize=12,
    bbox_to_anchor=(0.5,1.02)
)

# ======================================================
# AJUSTES
# ======================================================

plt.subplots_adjust(
    top=0.95,
    hspace=0.07,
    right=0.92
)

# ======================================================
# GUARDAR FIGURA
# ======================================================

plt.savefig(
    "climate_figure.png",
    dpi=600,
    bbox_inches="tight"
)

# ======================================================
# MOSTRAR
# ======================================================

plt.show()
```

## Specific Objective 1


```{python}
# ======================================================
# CONFIGURACION GENERAL
# ======================================================

sns.set_theme(
    style="whitegrid",
    context="paper"
)

palette_dict = {
    "T0": "#66c2a5",
    "T1": "#fc8d62",
    "T2": "#8da0cb",
    "T3": "#e78ac3"
}

# ======================================================
# VARIABLES
# ======================================================

variables = [
    "altura_cm",
    "n_macollos_golpe",
    "longitud_panoja_cm",
    "n_panojas_m2",
    "longitud_grano_mm",
    "ancho_grano_mm"
]

ylabels = [
    "Height (cm)",
    "Number of tillers per hill",
    "Panicle length (cm)",
    "Number of panicles per m²",
    "Grain length (mm)",
    "Grain width (mm)"
]

ylims = [
    (75,110),
    (20,45),
    (21,25),
    (20,45),
    (8,11),
    (2.1,2.7)
]

letters_panel = ["a","b","c","d","e","f"]

# ======================================================
# FUNCION PARA LETRAS DE TUKEY
# ======================================================

def tukey_letters(data, var):

    summary = data.groupby("Tratamiento")[var].agg(
        mean="mean"
    ).reset_index()

    tukey = pairwise_tukeyhsd(
        endog=data[var],
        groups=data["Tratamiento"],
        alpha=0.05
    )

    tukey_df = pd.DataFrame(
        data=tukey._results_table.data[1:],
        columns=tukey._results_table.data[0]
    )

    groups = list(summary["Tratamiento"])

    means = dict(
        zip(summary["Tratamiento"], summary["mean"])
    )

    groups_sorted = sorted(
        groups,
        key=lambda g: means[g],
        reverse=True
    )

    sig = pd.DataFrame(
        False,
        index=groups,
        columns=groups
    )

    for _, row in tukey_df.iterrows():

        g1 = row["group1"]
        g2 = row["group2"]

        sig.loc[g1, g2] = row["reject"]
        sig.loc[g2, g1] = row["reject"]

    letters_dict = {g: "" for g in groups}

    alphabet = list("abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz")

    for letter in alphabet:

        assigned = []

        for g in groups_sorted:

            if letters_dict[g] == "":

                compatible = True

                for a in assigned:

                    if sig.loc[g, a]:
                        compatible = False
                        break

                if compatible:
                    assigned.append(g)

        if not assigned:
            continue

        for g in assigned:
            letters_dict[g] += letter

        if all(letters_dict[g] != "" for g in groups):
            break

    return letters_dict

# ======================================================
# FIGURA PRINCIPAL
# ======================================================

fig, axes = plt.subplots(
    3,
    2,
    figsize=(12,11),
    sharex=True
)

axes = axes.flatten()

anova_results = {}

# ======================================================
# LOOP PRINCIPAL
# ======================================================

for i, var in enumerate(variables):

    ax = axes[i]

    # ==================================================
    # ANOVA
    # ==================================================

    modelo = ols(
        f"{var} ~ C(Localidad) + C(Localidad):C(Bloque) + C(Tratamiento)",
        data=morfo
    ).fit()

    anova_table = sm.stats.anova_lm(
        modelo,
        typ=2
    )

    anova_results[var] = anova_table

    # ==================================================
    # SUMMARY
    # ==================================================

    summary = morfo.groupby("Tratamiento")[var].agg(
        mean="mean",
        sem="sem"
    ).reset_index()

    order = summary["Tratamiento"].tolist()

    # ==================================================
    # LETRAS TUKEY
    # ==================================================

    letters_dict = tukey_letters(morfo, var)

    # ==================================================
    # GRAFICO
    # ==================================================

    sns.violinplot(
        data=morfo,
        x="Tratamiento",
        y=var,
        order=order,
        hue="Tratamiento",
        palette=palette_dict,
        inner="box",
        linewidth=1.2,
        cut=0,
        density_norm="width",
        legend=False,
        ax=ax
    )

    sns.stripplot(
    data=morfo,
    x="Tratamiento",
    y=var,
    order=order,
    color="black",
    size=3,
    jitter=0.15,
    alpha=0.5,
    ax=ax
)

    # ==================================================
    # AGREGAR LETRAS TUKEY
    # ==================================================

    offset = morfo[var].std() * 0.15

    for j, trat in enumerate(order):

        y_max = morfo.loc[
            morfo["Tratamiento"] == trat,
            var
        ].max()

        ax.text(
            j,
            y_max + offset,
            letters_dict[trat],
            ha="center",
            va="bottom",
            fontsize=10,
            fontweight="bold"
        )

    # ==================================================
    # ESTETICA
    # ==================================================

    ax.set_ylabel(ylabels[i])

    ax.set_ylim(ylims[i])

    ax.grid(
        True,
        axis="y",
        linestyle="-",
        alpha=0.7
    )

    sns.despine(
        left=False,
        bottom=False,
        ax=ax
    )

    # Letras panel
    ax.text(
        0.02,
        0.97,
        letters_panel[i],
        transform=ax.transAxes,
        fontsize=16,
        fontweight="bold",
        va="top"
    )

    # ==================================================
    # OCULTAR EJE X SUPERIOR
    # ==================================================

    if i < 4:

        ax.set_xlabel("")

        ax.tick_params(
            axis='x',
            bottom=False,
            labelbottom=False
        )

    else:
        ax.set_xlabel("Treatment")

# ======================================================
# LEYENDA GLOBAL
# ======================================================

legend_labels = [
    "T0: 17 000 m³ ha$^{-1}$",
    "T1: 15 000 m³ ha$^{-1}$",
    "T2: 14 000 m³ ha$^{-1}$",
    "T3: 13 000 m³ ha$^{-1}$"
]

handles = [
    plt.Rectangle((0,0),1,1,color=palette_dict[t])
    for t in ["T0", "T1", "T2", "T3"]
]

fig.legend(
    handles,
    legend_labels,
    loc="upper center",
    ncol=4,                    # una sola fila
    fontsize=10,
    frameon=True,
    bbox_to_anchor=(0.5,1.03)
)

# ======================================================
# AJUSTAR ESPACIADO
# ======================================================

plt.subplots_adjust(
    top=0.86,
    hspace=0.25,
    wspace=0.20
)

# ======================================================
# MOSTRAR
# ======================================================

plt.show()

plt.savefig(
    "figure_2.jpg",
    dpi=300,
    bbox_inches="tight"
)
```

## Specific Objective 2


```{python}
# ======================================================
# CONFIGURACION GENERAL
# ======================================================

sns.set_theme(
    style="whitegrid",
    context="paper"
)

palette_dict = {
    "T0": "#66c2a5",
    "T1": "#fc8d62",
    "T2": "#8da0cb",
    "T3": "#e78ac3"
}

# ======================================================
# VARIABLES
# ======================================================

variables = [
    "granos_enteros",
    "granos_quebrados",
    "granos_centro_blanco",
    "n_granos_vano",
    "n_granos_negro",
    "n_granos_lleno"
]

ylabels = [
    "Head rice (%)",
    "Broken rice (%)",
    "Grain chalkiness (%)",
    "Number of unfilled grains per panicle",
    "Number of black grains per panicle",
    "Number of filled grains per panicle"
]

ylims = [
    (35,75),
    (0,35),
    (0,40),
    (0,40),
    (0,18),
    (80,200)
]

letters_panel = ["a","b","c","d","e","f"]

# ======================================================
# FUNCION PARA LETRAS DE TUKEY
# ======================================================

def tukey_letters(calidad, var):

    summary = calidad.groupby("Tratamiento")[var].agg(
        mean="mean"
    ).reset_index()

    tukey = pairwise_tukeyhsd(
        endog=calidad[var],
        groups=calidad["Tratamiento"],
        alpha=0.05
    )

    tukey_df = pd.DataFrame(
        data=tukey._results_table.data[1:],
        columns=tukey._results_table.data[0]
    )

    groups = list(summary["Tratamiento"])

    means = dict(
        zip(summary["Tratamiento"], summary["mean"])
    )

    groups_sorted = sorted(
        groups,
        key=lambda g: means[g],
        reverse=True
    )

    sig = pd.DataFrame(
        False,
        index=groups,
        columns=groups
    )

    for _, row in tukey_df.iterrows():

        g1 = row["group1"]
        g2 = row["group2"]

        sig.loc[g1, g2] = row["reject"]
        sig.loc[g2, g1] = row["reject"]

    letters_dict = {g: "" for g in groups}

    alphabet = list("abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz")

    for letter in alphabet:

        assigned = []

        for g in groups_sorted:

            if letters_dict[g] == "":

                compatible = True

                for a in assigned:

                    if sig.loc[g, a]:
                        compatible = False
                        break

                if compatible:
                    assigned.append(g)

        if not assigned:
            continue

        for g in assigned:
            letters_dict[g] += letter

        if all(letters_dict[g] != "" for g in groups):
            break

    return letters_dict

# ======================================================
# FIGURA PRINCIPAL
# ======================================================

fig, axes = plt.subplots(
    3,
    2,
    figsize=(12,11),
    sharex=True
)

axes = axes.flatten()

anova_results = {}

# ======================================================
# LOOP PRINCIPAL
# ======================================================

for i, var in enumerate(variables):

    ax = axes[i]

    # ==================================================
    # ANOVA
    # ==================================================

    modelo = ols(
        f"{var} ~ C(Localidad) + C(Localidad):C(Bloque) + C(Tratamiento)",
        data=calidad
    ).fit()

    anova_table = sm.stats.anova_lm(
        modelo,
        typ=2
    )

    anova_results[var] = anova_table

    # ==================================================
    # SUMMARY
    # ==================================================

    summary = calidad.groupby("Tratamiento")[var].agg(
        mean="mean",
        sem="sem"
    ).reset_index()

    order = summary["Tratamiento"].tolist()

    # ==================================================
    # LETRAS TUKEY
    # ==================================================

    letters_dict = tukey_letters(calidad, var)

    # ==================================================
    # GRAFICO
    # ==================================================

    sns.violinplot(
        data=calidad,
        x="Tratamiento",
        y=var,
        order=order,
        hue="Tratamiento",
        palette=palette_dict,
        inner="box",
        linewidth=1.2,
        cut=0,
        density_norm="width",
        legend=False,
        ax=ax
    )

    sns.stripplot(
    data=calidad,
    x="Tratamiento",
    y=var,
    order=order,
    color="black",
    size=3,
    jitter=0.15,
    alpha=0.5,
    ax=ax
)

    # ==================================================
    # AGREGAR LETRAS TUKEY
    # ==================================================

    offset = calidad[var].std() * 0.15

    for j, trat in enumerate(order):

        y_max = calidad.loc[
            calidad["Tratamiento"] == trat,
            var
        ].max()

        ax.text(
            j,
            y_max + offset,
            letters_dict[trat],
            ha="center",
            va="bottom",
            fontsize=10,
            fontweight="bold"
        )

    # ==================================================
    # ESTETICA
    # ==================================================

    ax.set_ylabel(ylabels[i])

    ax.set_ylim(ylims[i])

    ax.grid(
        True,
        axis="y",
        linestyle="-",
        alpha=0.7
    )

    sns.despine(
        left=False,
        bottom=False,
        ax=ax
    )

    # Letras panel
    ax.text(
        0.02,
        0.97,
        letters_panel[i],
        transform=ax.transAxes,
        fontsize=16,
        fontweight="bold",
        va="top"
    )

    # ==================================================
    # OCULTAR EJE X SUPERIOR
    # ==================================================

    if i < 4:

        ax.set_xlabel("")

        ax.tick_params(
            axis='x',
            bottom=False,
            labelbottom=False
        )

    else:
        ax.set_xlabel("Treatment")

# ======================================================
# LEYENDA GLOBAL
# ======================================================

legend_labels = [
    "T0: 17 000 m³ ha$^{-1}$",
    "T1: 15 000 m³ ha$^{-1}$",
    "T2: 14 000 m³ ha$^{-1}$",
    "T3: 13 000 m³ ha$^{-1}$"
]

handles = [
    plt.Rectangle((0,0),1,1,color=palette_dict[t])
    for t in ["T0", "T1", "T2", "T3"]
]

fig.legend(
    handles,
    legend_labels,
    loc="upper center",
    ncol=4,                    # una sola fila
    fontsize=10,
    frameon=True,
    bbox_to_anchor=(0.5,1.03)
)

# ======================================================
# AJUSTAR ESPACIADO
# ======================================================

plt.subplots_adjust(
    top=0.86,
    hspace=0.25,
    wspace=0.20
)

# ======================================================
# MOSTRAR
# ======================================================

plt.show()

plt.savefig(
    "figure_3.jpg",
    dpi=300,
    bbox_inches="tight"
)
```

## Specific Objective 3


```{python}
# ======================================================
# VARIABLES
# ======================================================

variables = {
    "rendimiento_kg_ha": "Grain yield (kg ha-1)",
    "eficiencia_agua_kg_m3": "Irrigation water use efficiency (kg m³)"
}

# ======================================================
# FUNCION LETRAS TUKEY
# ======================================================

def tukey_letters(rdt, var):

    summary = rdt.groupby("Tratamiento")[var].agg(
        mean="mean"
    ).reset_index()

    tukey = pairwise_tukeyhsd(
        endog=rdt[var],
        groups=rdt["Tratamiento"],
        alpha=0.05
    )

    tukey_df = pd.DataFrame(
        data=tukey._results_table.data[1:],
        columns=tukey._results_table.data[0]
    )

    groups = list(summary["Tratamiento"])

    means = dict(
        zip(summary["Tratamiento"], summary["mean"])
    )

    groups_sorted = sorted(
        groups,
        key=lambda g: means[g],
        reverse=True
    )

    sig = pd.DataFrame(
        False,
        index=groups,
        columns=groups
    )

    for _, row in tukey_df.iterrows():

        g1 = row["group1"]
        g2 = row["group2"]

        sig.loc[g1, g2] = row["reject"]
        sig.loc[g2, g1] = row["reject"]

    letters_dict = {g: "" for g in groups}

    alphabet = list("abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz")

    for letter in alphabet:

        assigned = []

        for g in groups_sorted:

            if letters_dict[g] == "":

                compatible = True

                for a in assigned:

                    if sig.loc[g, a]:
                        compatible = False
                        break

                if compatible:
                    assigned.append(g)

        if not assigned:
            continue

        for g in assigned:
            letters_dict[g] += letter

        if all(letters_dict[g] != "" for g in groups):
            break

    return letters_dict

# ======================================================
# TABLA FINAL
# ======================================================

tabla_final = pd.DataFrame()

# tratamientos
tabla_final["Treatment"] = sorted(
    morfo["Tratamiento"].unique()
)

# ======================================================
# LOOP VARIABLES
# ======================================================

for var, label in variables.items():

    # summary
    summary = rdt.groupby("Tratamiento")[var].agg(
        mean="mean",
        sd="std"
    ).reset_index()

    # letras
    letters_dict = tukey_letters(rdt, var)

    # columna final
    summary[label] = (
        summary["mean"].round(2).astype(str)
        + " ± "
        + summary["sd"].round(2).astype(str)
        + " "
        + summary["Tratamiento"].map(letters_dict)
    )

    # agregar a tabla
    tabla_final[label] = summary[label]

# ======================================================
# VER TABLA
# ======================================================

print(tabla_final)

tabla_final.to_excel(
    "table_morphology.xlsx",
    index=False
)
```
